name: Pasadena Squiggly Lane Gangster Bloods
description: Founder: Unknown Founded Location: Pasadena, California Territory: Pasadena/Altadena Ethnicity: Predominantly African-American Membership: Approximately 80 members Notable Members: Stone Mack, Damion Lane (D-Lane), Looney Lane The Squiggly Lane Gangster Bloods (SLGB), also known as the Pasadena Squiggly Lane Gangsters (PSLG), 5 Deuce Squiggly Lane Gangster Bloods, or simply Squiggly Lanes, are an African-American street gang based on the west side of Pasadena, California.

sources.title: Pasadena Squiggly Lane Gangster Bloods — UnitedGangs
